Off Calendar Mar-08-2024 Off Calendar

Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-21-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF PRECILA BALABBO, EMA BELL's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment is granted.

Order signed. Consent judgment signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
